name: one man scoutship
description: I'm in a one man scoutship
hints: Look around the ship carefully. There are controls and a door.
The red button on the console does something important.
You need to open the door to leave the ship, but how? Try PUSH RED.
PUSH RED to cycle the airlock. Then go DOWN to the storage hold to gear up.
notes: Starting room. Your crashed scoutship. Get supplies from the hold below before venturing outside.
